parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.

parameters.name: sfs_type
parameters.description: OceanFS storage type: massive for capacity storage or massive_perf for performance storage.

parameters.name: sfs_protocol
parameters.description: File-system protocol: nfs for Linux or cifs for Windows.

parameters.name: sfs_name
parameters.description: OceanFS file-system name containing 2-255 letters, digits, or hyphens; it must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen.

parameters.name: sfs_size
parameters.description: File-system capacity from 100 to 1048576 GB, subject to the tenant's remaining quota.

parameters.name: on_demand
parameters.description: Whether the new file systems use on-demand billing; default is true. Cycle type and count are required when false.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type: year or month.

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription cycle count: 1-3 for yearly billing or 1-36 for monthly billing.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability-zone name for the file system; omit it in a single-AZ region.

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: VPC ID to bind to the new file system.

parameters.name: subnet_id
parameters.description: Subnet ID used to allocate the VPC endpoint address when VPCE creation is enabled.

parameters.name: is_vpce
parameters.description: Whether OceanFS creates a free VPC endpoint for the file-system binding.

parameters.name: order_num
parameters.description: Number of identically configured file systems to create, from 1 to 10; default is 1.

parameters.name: label_list
parameters.description: JSON array of up to ten labels to bind to each created file system.

examples: ctyun oceanfs file-system create --sfs-type massive --sfs-protocol nfs --sfs-name sfs-2023-0314-1658 --sfs-size 500 --vpc-id vpc-2ophm4xirb

parameters.name: permission_group_name
parameters.description: Permission-group name containing 2-63 letters, digits, or hyphens; it must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen.

parameters.name: network_type
parameters.description: Permission-group network type; only private_network is supported.

parameters.name: permission_group_description
parameters.description: Permission-group description containing at most 128 Chinese or English characters.

examples: ctyun oceanfs permission-group create --permission-group-name pgtest1 --network-type private_network

parameters.name: permission_group_fuid
parameters.description: OceanFS permission-group FUID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: auth_addr
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 host or network authorised by the permission rule; use * to allow every address.

parameters.name: rw_permission
parameters.description: Access mode: rw for read-write access or ro for read-only access.

parameters.name: user_permission
parameters.description: NFS user mapping: no_root_squash, all_squash, or root_squash.

parameters.name: permission_rule_priority
parameters.description: Unique rule priority from 1 to 400, where 1 is the highest priority.

examples: ctyun oceanfs permission-rule create --permission-group-fuid 3d69c5b8-699a-53c4-bd85-d70e93a658eb --auth-addr 10.151.11.11/24 --rw-permission ro --user-permission no_root_squash --permission-rule-priority 1
